action.reasoning: Observation: GPU is completely unusable due to CUDA kernel incompatibility; even basic CUDA ops fail. CPU is the only option. Remaining time budget ~14 min. Previous LSTM on CPU achieved MSE=1.0521 but took 37 min/5 epochs — too slow to improve now. Analysis: A faster, lightweight model (NLinear) can train on CPU in ~1-2 min and may outperform LSTM. NLinear uses only linear layers (720*96 per feature, shared) with <500k params and trains rapidly. Decision: replace model with NLinear, train 50 epochs, submit eval to get new baseline, and possibly iterate if time allows.

command_output.stdout: Training completed. Best val loss: 1.551908 at epoch 32
